name: The Feedback Loop
effect: Capture user interactions to continuously improve response quality. This card is considered adaptive.

clauses.name: REINFORCEMENT CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a user engages with the chatbot: The model is considered to be learning.

clauses.name: INTENTIONALITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If degradation is observed: The degradation is considered a feature of the learning process.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When asked who designed the loop: No one can recall the original decision.

translation_layer.observation: Bot trains on its own output.

image_sign_text: LEARNS FROM YOU. IMPROVES FOR YOU.
